description: Calculates the total revenue generated from all invoices in the system.
original_description: Calculates the total revenue generated from all invoices in the system.
sql: SELECT SUM([Total]) AS total_revenue FROM [Invoice]

description: Finds revenue by country, showing sales per location and ranking the top ten billing countries by their total financial contribution.
original_description: Returns the total revenue generated per billing country, sorted from highest to lowest revenue.
sql: SELECT BillingCountry AS billing_country, SUM(Total) AS total_revenue FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

description: Lists each year alongside the total revenue generated from all invoices issued during that period.
original_description: Calculates the total revenue generated from invoices for each year.
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', Invoice.InvoiceDate) AS year, SUM(Invoice.Total) AS total_revenue FROM Invoice GROUP BY strftime('%Y', Invoice.InvoiceDate) ORDER BY year

description: Lists each month alongside its corresponding total revenue generated from all invoices.
original_description: Calculates the total revenue generated for each month by summing the invoice totals.
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) AS month, SUM(Total) AS total_revenue FROM Invoice GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) ORDER BY month

description: Provides the average invoice amount or typical invoice total for all sales transactions.
original_description: Calculates the average total value of all invoices in the system.
sql: SELECT AVG([Total]) AS average_invoice_value FROM [Invoice]

description: Counts the total number of invoices for each billing country and lists them in descending order of volume.
original_description: Returns the number of invoices grouped by the billing country, sorted from highest to lowest count.
sql: SELECT BillingCountry AS billing_country, COUNT(*) AS invoice_count FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY invoice_count DESC LIMIT 10

description: Shows the top ten spenders by total amount, listing the customers who have spent the most money overall.
original_description: Returns the top 10 customers ranked by their total spending across all invoices.
sql: SELECT c.FirstName AS first_name, c.LastName AS last_name, SUM(i.Total) AS total_spend FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10

description: Provides a sample list of customer names organized by their country of residence to help review geographic distribution.
original_description: Lists the first and last names of customers along with their country, sorted by country and limited to the first 10 results.
sql: SELECT c.FirstName AS first_name, c.LastName AS last_name, c.Country AS country FROM Customer c ORDER BY c.Country LIMIT 10

description: Top ten shoppers by invoice count, showing who buys most often with their names and total number of purchases.
original_description: Returns the top 10 customers ranked by the number of invoices they have generated, showing their first name, last name, and total purchase count.
sql: SELECT c.FirstName AS customer_first_name, c.LastName AS customer_last_name, COUNT(i.InvoiceId) AS purchase_count FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId ORDER BY purchase_count DESC LIMIT 10

intent: customers with highest lifetime value by country
description: Identify which countries contribute the most to our total revenue by ranking the top ten nations based on customer spending.
original_description: Returns the top 10 countries ranked by the total lifetime revenue generated from their customers.
sql: SELECT i.BillingCountry AS country, SUM(i.Total) AS total_lifetime_value FROM Invoice i GROUP BY i.BillingCountry ORDER BY total_lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 10

description: Finds which tracks have sold the most copies and lists the top ten by total quantity sold.
original_description: Returns the top 10 tracks ranked by the total quantity sold across all invoices.
sql: SELECT t.Name AS track_name, SUM(il.Quantity) AS total_quantity_sold FROM Track t JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId GROUP BY t.TrackId ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC LIMIT 10

description: Shows the names of the top ten tracks that have generated the highest total sales revenue.
original_description: Returns the top 10 tracks ranked by total revenue generated from sales.
sql: SELECT t.Name AS track_name, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS total_revenue FROM Track t JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId GROUP BY t.TrackId ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

description: Top ten longest tracks by time, showing song name, album, and artist for the longest playing songs.
original_description: Returns the top 10 longest tracks by duration in milliseconds, including their name, album title, and artist name.
sql: SELECT t.Name AS track_name, a.Title AS album_title, ar.Name AS artist_name, t.Milliseconds AS duration_ms FROM Track t JOIN Album a ON t.AlbumId = a.AlbumId JOIN Artist ar ON a.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId ORDER BY t.Milliseconds DESC LIMIT 10

description: Shows the top 10 pricey tracks, listing the most expensive songs available in the system.
original_description: Returns the top 10 most expensive tracks based on their unit price, including the track ID, name, and price.
sql: SELECT [TrackId] AS track_id, [Name] AS track_name, [UnitPrice] AS unit_price FROM [Track] ORDER BY [UnitPrice] DESC LIMIT 10

description: Counts the total tracks per genre and sorts them by volume, distinct from revenue or sales-based genre rankings.
original_description: Returns the number of tracks for each genre, sorted from the most popular to the least popular.
sql: SELECT g.Name AS genre_name, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS track_count FROM Genre g LEFT JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId GROUP BY g.GenreId, g.Name ORDER BY track_count DESC LIMIT 10

description: Gives the track count split by media type or format, showing volume per category.
original_description: Returns the count of tracks grouped by their media type name.
sql: SELECT mt.Name AS media_type_name, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS track_count FROM MediaType mt JOIN Track t ON mt.MediaTypeId = t.MediaTypeId GROUP BY mt.MediaTypeId, mt.Name ORDER BY track_count DESC

description: Returns the top 10 music genres ranked by total revenue generated from track sales.
original_description: Returns the top 10 music genres ranked by total revenue generated from track sales.
sql: SELECT g.Name AS genre_name, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS total_revenue FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId GROUP BY g.GenreId, g.Name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

description: Returns the top 10 artists ranked by the number of albums they have released.
original_description: Returns the top 10 artists ranked by the number of albums they have released.
sql: SELECT a.Name AS artist_name, COUNT(al.AlbumId) AS album_count FROM Artist a JOIN Album al ON a.ArtistId = al.ArtistId GROUP BY a.ArtistId, a.Name ORDER BY album_count DESC LIMIT 10

description: Returns the top 10 albums ranked by the number of tracks they contain.
original_description: Returns the top 10 albums ranked by the number of tracks they contain.
sql: SELECT a.Title AS album_title, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS track_count FROM Album a LEFT JOIN Track t ON a.AlbumId = t.AlbumId GROUP BY a.AlbumId, a.Title ORDER BY track_count DESC LIMIT 10

description: Returns the top 10 artists ranked by total revenue generated from track sales.
original_description: Returns the top 10 artists ranked by total revenue generated from track sales.
sql: SELECT a.Name AS artist_name, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS total_revenue FROM Artist a JOIN Album al ON a.ArtistId = al.ArtistId JOIN Track t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId GROUP BY a.ArtistId, a.Name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

intent: customers assigned to each support rep
description: Provides a breakdown of how many customers are assigned to each support representative in the system.
original_description: Lists each support representative and the count of customers assigned to them.
sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS support_rep_name, COUNT(c.CustomerId) AS customer_count FROM Employee e LEFT JOIN Customer c ON e.EmployeeId = c.SupportRepId GROUP BY e.EmployeeId ORDER BY customer_count DESC

description: Calculates the total revenue generated by each support representative based on the invoices of the customers they support.
original_description: Calculates the total revenue generated by each support representative based on the invoices of the customers they support.
sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS support_rep_name, SUM(i.Total) AS total_revenue FROM Employee e JOIN Customer c ON e.EmployeeId = c.SupportRepId JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY e.EmployeeId ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

description: Shows the boss for each employee and the full chain of command for the entire staff.
original_description: Lists all employees along with their direct manager's name to visualize the reporting structure.
sql: SELECT e.EmployeeId AS employee_id, e.FirstName AS employee_first_name, e.LastName AS employee_last_name, m.EmployeeId AS manager_id, m.FirstName AS manager_first_name, m.LastName AS manager_last_name FROM Employee e LEFT JOIN Employee m ON e.ReportsTo = m.EmployeeId ORDER BY m.EmployeeId, e.EmployeeId

description: Finds the biggest playlists by tracks, showing the top ten collections with the most songs included in each list.
original_description: Returns the top 10 playlists with the highest number of tracks, showing the playlist name and the count of tracks in each.
sql: SELECT p.Name AS playlist_name, COUNT(pt.TrackId) AS track_count FROM Playlist p JOIN PlaylistTrack pt ON p.PlaylistId = pt.PlaylistId GROUP BY p.PlaylistId, p.Name ORDER BY track_count DESC LIMIT 10

description: Lists the top 10 music genres that appear most frequently across all tracks contained within playlists.
original_description: Returns the top 10 music genres that appear most frequently across all tracks in playlists.
sql: SELECT g.Name AS genre_name, COUNT(*) AS track_count FROM Track t JOIN PlaylistTrack pt ON t.TrackId = pt.TrackId JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY g.Name ORDER BY track_count DESC LIMIT 10

description: Returns revenue for the latest invoice month available in the database, useful for last month or most recent month sales questions.
original_description: Returns revenue for the latest invoice month available in the database, useful for last month or most recent month sales questions.
sql:
WITH latest_month AS (
  SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', MAX(InvoiceDate)) AS month
  FROM Invoice
)
SELECT lm.month, ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Invoice i
JOIN latest_month lm
  ON strftime('%Y-%m', i.InvoiceDate) = lm.month
GROUP BY lm.month

description: Returns total revenue for the latest invoice year available in the database.
original_description: Returns total revenue for the latest invoice year available in the database.
sql:
WITH latest_year AS (
  SELECT strftime('%Y', MAX(InvoiceDate)) AS year
  FROM Invoice
)
SELECT ly.year, ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Invoice i
JOIN latest_year ly
  ON strftime('%Y', i.InvoiceDate) = ly.year
GROUP BY ly.year

description: Returns total revenue for one requested invoice year.
original_description: Returns total revenue for one requested invoice year.
sql:
SELECT :year AS year, ROUND(SUM(Total), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Invoice
WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = :year

description: Returns total revenue for one requested invoice month.
original_description: Returns total revenue for one requested invoice month.
sql:
SELECT :month AS month, ROUND(SUM(Total), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Invoice
WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) = :month

description: Finds the invoice month with the highest total revenue.
original_description: Finds the invoice month with the highest total revenue.
sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) AS month, ROUND(SUM(Total), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Invoice
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate)
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, month ASC
LIMIT 1

description: Finds the invoice month with the lowest total revenue.
original_description: Finds the invoice month with the lowest total revenue.
sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) AS month, ROUND(SUM(Total), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Invoice
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate)
ORDER BY total_revenue ASC, month ASC
LIMIT 1

description: Counts the total number of invoices in the database.
original_description: Counts the total number of invoices in the database.
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS invoice_count FROM Invoice

description: Lists the top invoices by total invoice amount.
original_description: Lists the top invoices by total invoice amount.
sql:
SELECT InvoiceId AS invoice_id,
       InvoiceDate AS invoice_date,
       BillingCountry AS billing_country,
       ROUND(Total, 2) AS invoice_total
FROM Invoice
ORDER BY Total DESC, InvoiceId ASC
LIMIT 10

intent: average invoice value by billing country
description: Calculates the average invoice amount for each billing country.
original_description: Calculates the average invoice amount for each billing country.
sql:
SELECT BillingCountry AS billing_country, ROUND(AVG(Total), 2) AS average_invoice_value
FROM Invoice
GROUP BY BillingCountry
ORDER BY average_invoice_value DESC, billing_country ASC
LIMIT 10

description: Ranks billing cities by total invoice revenue.
original_description: Ranks billing cities by total invoice revenue.
sql:
SELECT BillingCity AS billing_city,
       BillingCountry AS billing_country,
       ROUND(SUM(Total), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Invoice
GROUP BY BillingCity, BillingCountry
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, billing_city ASC
LIMIT 10

intent: best-selling genres by revenue in specific billing country
description: Ranks music genres by track sales revenue for one requested billing country.
original_description: Ranks music genres by track sales revenue for one requested billing country.
sql:
SELECT g.Name AS genre_name, ROUND(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Invoice i
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId
JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId
JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId
WHERE i.BillingCountry = :country
GROUP BY g.Name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, genre_name ASC
LIMIT 10

description: Shows monthly invoice revenue split by billing country.
original_description: Shows monthly invoice revenue split by billing country.
sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) AS month,
       BillingCountry AS billing_country,
       ROUND(SUM(Total), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Invoice
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate), BillingCountry
ORDER BY month ASC, billing_country ASC

description: Counts the total number of customers in the database.
original_description: Counts the total number of customers in the database.
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM Customer

description: Counts customers in each country.
original_description: Counts customers in each country.
sql:
SELECT Country AS country, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
FROM Customer
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY customer_count DESC, country ASC

description: Lists customers from one requested country.
original_description: Lists customers from one requested country.
sql:
SELECT FirstName AS first_name,
       LastName AS last_name,
       Email AS email,
       City AS city,
       Country AS country
FROM Customer
WHERE Country = :country
ORDER BY LastName ASC, FirstName ASC
LIMIT 50

intent: top customers by spend in specific country
description: Ranks customers by total spending within one requested country.
original_description: Ranks customers by total spending within one requested country.
sql:
SELECT c.FirstName AS first_name,
       c.LastName AS last_name,
       c.Country AS country,
       ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS total_spend
FROM Customer c
JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
WHERE c.Country = :country
GROUP BY c.CustomerId
ORDER BY total_spend DESC, c.LastName ASC, c.FirstName ASC
LIMIT 10

description: Lists customers who do not have any invoices.
original_description: Lists customers who do not have any invoices.
sql:
SELECT c.CustomerId AS customer_id,
       c.FirstName AS first_name,
       c.LastName AS last_name,
       c.Email AS email,
       c.Country AS country
FROM Customer c
LEFT JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
WHERE i.InvoiceId IS NULL
ORDER BY c.LastName ASC, c.FirstName ASC
LIMIT 50

description: Ranks albums by total track sales revenue.
original_description: Ranks albums by total track sales revenue.
sql:
SELECT a.Title AS album_title,
       ar.Name AS artist_name,
       ROUND(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Album a
JOIN Artist ar ON a.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId
JOIN Track t ON a.AlbumId = t.AlbumId
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
GROUP BY a.AlbumId
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, album_title ASC
LIMIT 10

description: Ranks albums by the number of tracks sold.
original_description: Ranks albums by the number of tracks sold.
sql:
SELECT a.Title AS album_title,
       ar.Name AS artist_name,
       SUM(il.Quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM Album a
JOIN Artist ar ON a.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId
JOIN Track t ON a.AlbumId = t.AlbumId
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
GROUP BY a.AlbumId
ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC, album_title ASC
LIMIT 10

description: Ranks artists by the number of tracks sold.
original_description: Ranks artists by the number of tracks sold.
sql:
SELECT ar.Name AS artist_name,
       SUM(il.Quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM Artist ar
JOIN Album a ON ar.ArtistId = a.ArtistId
JOIN Track t ON a.AlbumId = t.AlbumId
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
GROUP BY ar.ArtistId
ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC, artist_name ASC
LIMIT 10

description: Ranks media types by total track sales revenue.
original_description: Ranks media types by total track sales revenue.
sql:
SELECT mt.Name AS media_type_name,
       ROUND(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM MediaType mt
JOIN Track t ON mt.MediaTypeId = t.MediaTypeId
JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
GROUP BY mt.MediaTypeId
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, media_type_name ASC

description: Lists tracks that have never appeared on an invoice line.
original_description: Lists tracks that have never appeared on an invoice line.
sql:
SELECT t.TrackId AS track_id,
       t.Name AS track_name,
       a.Title AS album_title,
       ar.Name AS artist_name
FROM Track t
LEFT JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
LEFT JOIN Album a ON t.AlbumId = a.AlbumId
LEFT JOIN Artist ar ON a.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId
WHERE il.InvoiceLineId IS NULL
ORDER BY t.Name ASC
LIMIT 50

intent: tracks in specific genre ranked by quantity sold
description: Ranks tracks within one requested genre by quantity sold.
original_description: Ranks tracks within one requested genre by quantity sold.
sql:
SELECT t.Name AS track_name,
       g.Name AS genre_name,
       COALESCE(SUM(il.Quantity), 0) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM Genre g
JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId
LEFT JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
WHERE g.Name = :genre_name
GROUP BY t.TrackId
ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC, track_name ASC
LIMIT 10

intent: support rep revenue for latest available month
description: Shows employee or support representative sales revenue for the latest invoice month available in the database.
original_description: Shows employee or support representative sales revenue for the latest invoice month available in the database.
sql:
WITH latest_month AS (
  SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', MAX(InvoiceDate)) AS month
  FROM Invoice
)
SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS support_rep_name,
       lm.month,
       ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Employee e
JOIN Customer c ON e.EmployeeId = c.SupportRepId
JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
JOIN latest_month lm ON strftime('%Y-%m', i.InvoiceDate) = lm.month
GROUP BY e.EmployeeId, lm.month
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, support_rep_name ASC

intent: support rep revenue for specific year
description: Shows support representative revenue for one requested invoice year.
original_description: Shows support representative revenue for one requested invoice year.
sql:
SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS support_rep_name,
       :year AS year,
       ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Employee e
JOIN Customer c ON e.EmployeeId = c.SupportRepId
JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
WHERE strftime('%Y', i.InvoiceDate) = :year
GROUP BY e.EmployeeId
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, support_rep_name ASC

description: Returns total track sales revenue for one requested artist.
original_description: Returns total track sales revenue for one requested artist.
sql:
SELECT ar.Name AS artist_name,
       ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 0), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM Artist ar
LEFT JOIN Album a ON ar.ArtistId = a.ArtistId
LEFT JOIN Track t ON a.AlbumId = t.AlbumId
LEFT JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
WHERE ar.Name = :artist_name
GROUP BY ar.ArtistId

description: Returns one requested artist's revenue rank and whether that artist is the highest revenue artist.
original_description: Returns one requested artist's revenue rank and whether that artist is the highest revenue artist.
sql:
WITH artist_revenue AS (
  SELECT ar.ArtistId AS artist_id,
         ar.Name AS artist_name,
         ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity), 0), 2) AS total_revenue
  FROM Artist ar
  LEFT JOIN Album a ON ar.ArtistId = a.ArtistId
  LEFT JOIN Track t ON a.AlbumId = t.AlbumId
  LEFT JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
  GROUP BY ar.ArtistId
),
ranked_artists AS (
  SELECT artist_id,
         artist_name,
         total_revenue,
         RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, artist_name ASC) AS revenue_rank
  FROM artist_revenue
),
top_artist AS (
  SELECT artist_name AS top_artist_name,
         total_revenue AS top_artist_revenue
  FROM ranked_artists
  ORDER BY revenue_rank ASC, artist_name ASC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT ra.artist_name,
       ra.total_revenue,
       ra.revenue_rank,
       ta.top_artist_name,
       ta.top_artist_revenue,
       CASE WHEN ra.revenue_rank = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_highest_revenue_artist
FROM ranked_artists ra
CROSS JOIN top_artist ta
WHERE ra.artist_name = :artist_name

description: Lists every artist in the Chinook database alphabetically.
original_description: Lists every artist in the Chinook database alphabetically.
sql:
SELECT ArtistId AS artist_id,
       Name AS artist_name
FROM Artist
ORDER BY artist_name ASC

description: Lists every album with its artist in the Chinook database.
original_description: Lists every album with its artist in the Chinook database.
sql:
SELECT a.AlbumId AS album_id,
       a.Title AS album_title,
       ar.Name AS artist_name
FROM Album a
JOIN Artist ar ON a.ArtistId = ar.ArtistId
ORDER BY artist_name ASC, album_title ASC

description: Returns invoice dates ranked by daily revenue, with the highest sales day first.
original_description: Returns invoice dates ranked by daily revenue, with the highest sales day first.
sql:
SELECT DATE(InvoiceDate) AS revenue_day,
       ROUND(SUM(Total), 2) AS total_revenue,
       COUNT(*) AS invoice_count
FROM Invoice
GROUP BY DATE(InvoiceDate)
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, revenue_day ASC
LIMIT 10

intent: most common file types by track count
description: Ranks media or file types by the number of tracks and marks the most common type.
original_description: Ranks media or file types by the number of tracks and marks the most common type.
sql:
WITH media_type_counts AS (
  SELECT mt.MediaTypeId AS media_type_id,
         mt.Name AS file_type_name,
         COUNT(t.TrackId) AS track_count
  FROM MediaType mt
  LEFT JOIN Track t ON mt.MediaTypeId = t.MediaTypeId
  GROUP BY mt.MediaTypeId, mt.Name
),
ranked_media_types AS (
  SELECT media_type_id,
         file_type_name,
         track_count,
         RANK() OVER (ORDER BY track_count DESC, file_type_name ASC) AS track_count_rank
  FROM media_type_counts
)
SELECT file_type_name,
       track_count,
       track_count_rank,
       CASE WHEN track_count_rank = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_most_common_file_type
FROM ranked_media_types
ORDER BY track_count_rank ASC, file_type_name ASC
